Access archived leaderboard score data

The Unity Leaderboards REST API provides Player and Admin endpoints for managing competitive leaderboards in Unity games. Player endpoints allow submitting and retrieving scores, while Admin endpoints manage leaderboard configuration, bucket definitions, and score archive policies.
